metadata.description: A phased, multi-agent workflow that asks what it needs, then autonomously builds AND deploys modern, high-converting landing pages that don't look AI-generated.

plugins.name: landing-craft
plugins.description: Orchestrates 8 specialist sub-agents (strategy → copy → design → build → motion → polish → seo → review) to build a modern, elegant, intuitive, high-converting landing. Reuses the design stack (marketing-strategy, brand-voice, motion-craft, seo-geo, design-review-loop, Impeccable). Next.js by default; framework-agnostic.
